name: Fall Apart Moose C/p
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a large crock pot on high temperature setting.
2. Dice onions and carrots; add them to the crock pot.
3. Add moose roast.
4. Slice garlic into small pieces; add it as well.
5. Pour water, garlic, and onion soup mix into the crock pot.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Cover and cook for 4 hours.
8. Drain juice from the meat into a saucepan.
9. Add bouillon cubes to the saucepan; bring the mixture to a boil.
10. Stir in cornstarch until the juice thickens and clears, forming a gravy.
11. Pour the gravy back into the crock pot with the moose, carrots, and onions.
12. Cook for another hour.
13. Slice the moose thinly and place it in the center of the serving platter.
14. Garnish with carrots and onions; pour a small amount of gravy over the meat to serve.
15. Mashed potatoes, rice, or baked potatoes pair well with the remaining gravy.
